query: SELECT cd.id, cd.title, c.name as clientName, cd.documentType, cd.fileUrl, cd.uploadedAt FROM clientDocuments cd JOIN clients c ON cd.clientId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Parque%Coqueiros%' OR c.name LIKE '%Coqueiros%' ORDER BY cd.uploadedAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dpww5ojRjr6Y1mQ.root --database E9d4S3iuourgT5XZT9a7F3 --execute SELECT cd.id, cd.title, c.name as clientName, cd.documentType, cd.fileUrl, cd.uploadedAt FROM clientDocuments cd JOIN clients c ON cd.clientId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Parque%Coqueiros%' OR c.name LIKE '%Coqueiros%' ORDER BY cd.uploadedAt DESC;
